A '''prodding rod''' was a weapon used by the [[Rok's species|Green-skinned harvesters]], presumably for handling [[Foonar]]s.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 5|''Ewoks'' (1985) 5]] {{1st}}
